description:
# [1.1.0](https://github.com/liaralabs/revanced-patches/compare/v1.0.1...v1.1.0) (2025-11-22)


### Bug Fixes

* ensure compatibleWith is set ([0ab06d0](https://github.com/liaralabs/revanced-patches/commit/0ab06d019e72dfc5645815275038daa067b19047))
* **exportToFrontend:** put dependsOn in the correct place ([db20cea](https://github.com/liaralabs/revanced-patches/commit/db20ceae485758c67d0117323ee49fcc8d2a1cdb))
* **exportToFrontend:** simplify intent filter prefix ([e7dce96](https://github.com/liaralabs/revanced-patches/commit/e7dce966c7d984ea4270d747ddc7e517f09916f5))
* **exportToFrontend:** use a more appropriate activity name ([f0c7ca4](https://github.com/liaralabs/revanced-patches/commit/f0c7ca47cf8216ed5ec2e7249f601473682f3e7a))
* **gamehub:** patch organization and consolidation ([d4491e9](https://github.com/liaralabs/revanced-patches/commit/d4491e951edb10544e69e535d8ec75de61f40605))
* **gamehub:** rename functions ([7ad2440](https://github.com/liaralabs/revanced-patches/commit/7ad24401c3c5a5aaae51f05aec05ad592c69a5cc))
* **readme:** tested versions ([6b0444d](https://github.com/liaralabs/revanced-patches/commit/6b0444d6a3441a029653d82565d421f75c4eca2f))
* update patches.api with new patch ([4b2e5ab](https://github.com/liaralabs/revanced-patches/commit/4b2e5ab77bb868077d80c799897c9df49ea94ea0))


### Features

* **gamehub:** enable android debugging ([fd630cb](https://github.com/liaralabs/revanced-patches/commit/fd630cbc734261fc9392f6aacc3631b76d75c3f9))
